SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Judgment Entered

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Continued To Oct-27-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 210

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Continued To Oct-26-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR SMALL CLAIM MATTER ON THURSDAY, OCT-08-2009, COMMENCING AT 4:13 P.M. AS ASSIGNED BY DEPARTMENT 206 (D.LOK): PLAINTIFF J. YO WONG AND DEFENDANT CHUCK HOUK BOTH APPEAR IN PROPRIA PERSONA AS ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 210 BY DEPT. 206 THIS DAY.

4:17 P.M.: THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO BOTH PLAINTIFF J. YO WONG AND TO DEFENDANT CHUCK HOUK.
OFF THE RECORD, THE COURT HEARS INITIAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES.

4:50 P.M.: AFTER HEARING INITIAL STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT, THE COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF WONG TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A COPY OF THE TENANT'S
RENTAL AGREEMENT; DEFENDANT CHUCK HOUK IS REQUESTED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH COPIES OF ALL CANCELLED CHECKS FOR UTILITIES CLAIMED TO BE PAID.

4:57 P.M.: THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER CONTINUED TO MONDAY, OCTOBER 26,2009, AT 3:30 P.M.; BOTH PARTIES ARE NOTIFIED TO RETURN AND PRESENT ADDITIONAL DOCUMENTATION FOR THE COURT'S REVIEW.

HON. SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-210).
